name: My employer denied my toxic exposure illness claim in Boise, what now?
description: Appeal to Industrial Commission within 20 days with better evidence.[2]

mainEntity.name: My employer denied my toxic exposure illness claim in Boise, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal to Industrial Commission within 20 days with better evidence.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal to the Idaho Industrial Commission within 20 days of denial.[2] Provide stronger medical evidence disputing denial reasons.[3] Key factors: (1) appeal deadline; (2) new causation proof; (3) hearing request. Request all insurer records, get second opinion. Don't accept first denial. Attorney increases success odds.
